extension.summary: LibTV - Your Kodi Library as Real TV
extension.description: Turn your movies and TV shows into linear channels with full TV guide support. Generates an M3U playlist and XMLTV guide for PVR IPTV Simple Client, with plugin-resolved streams so channels play whatever is currently on air.
extension.news:
v0.7.5: fix the EPG overlay not accepting focus — setFocus() was called from __init__, before the window was shown, which Kodi logs as "Control N in window M has been asked to focus, but it can't" with no traceback. Focus is now set from onInit(), the documented hook for a hand-built window that's actually been shown.
v0.7.4: fix a crash in the in-playback EPG overlay — xbmcgui.ControlList(itemHeight=...) raised TypeError on real Kodi (the actual keyword is _itemHeight, undocumented in the API prose). The keymap hotkey trigger itself is now confirmed firing correctly on real Kodi/PVR playback; this was the bug it uncovered.
v0.7.3: a keymap bound only under FullscreenVideo did nothing while a PVR channel was actually playing (confirmed live: zero log trace) — the hotkey is now written for both FullscreenVideo and FullscreenLiveTV window contexts, since some Kodi versions/skins route live TV playback through the legacy one. Re-save your hotkey (Settings > Guide & playback > Save hotkey now) and restart Kodi to pick up the fix.
